deviations.description: The process model enforces termination both when donor consent is not given and when consent is retracted, as shown by the explicit parallel path allowing for consent retraction and immediate process termination. Version 2 of the requirement only obligates termination when consent is not given, removing the obligation to terminate upon consent retraction. The process continues to enforce the stricter, outdated constraint from Version 1.
process_model_reference: Consent retraction and process termination path
